parameters.name: FileSystemId
parameters.description: The ID of the file system.

parameters.name: LifecyclePolicyId
parameters.description: The ID of the lifecycle policy.

parameters.name: LifecyclePolicyName
parameters.description:
The name of the lifecycle policy.

The name must be 3 to 64 characters in length and can contain letters, digits, underscores (\_), and hyphens (-). The name must start with a letter.

parameters.name: LifecycleRuleName
parameters.description:
The management rule that is associated with the lifecycle policy.

Valid values:

*   DEFAULT_ATIME\_14: Files not accessed for 14 days.
*   DEFAULT_ATIME\_30: Files not accessed for 30 days.
*   DEFAULT_ATIME\_60: Files not accessed for 60 days.
*   DEFAULT_ATIME\_90: Files not accessed for 90 days.
*   DEFAULT_ATIME\_180: Files not accessed for 180 days. DEFAULT_ATIME\_180 is supported only when the StorageType parameter is set to Archive.

>  If an IA policy has already been set for the directory, any subsequent archival policy must have a longer duration than the IA policy.

parameters.name: Path
parameters.description:
The absolute path of a directory with which the lifecycle policy is associated.

The path must start with a forward slash (/) and must be a path that exists in the mount target.

parameters.name: StorageType
parameters.description:
The storage class.

*   InfrequentAccess: the Infrequent Access (IA) storage class.
*   Archive: the Archive storage class.
